items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 113.1 mph at a 17.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the New York Mets, KC 2, NYM 6. Randy Dobnak led the night, working 5.2 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 3 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 113.1 mph.
items.title: Royals at Mets Recap
